findings: SKILL.md:407 explicitly requires no-silent-downgrade: 'if the full child swarm cannot launch, the commander bundle must be partial or failed'
README.md:130 documents: 'must report a partial bundle rather than silently downgrading if the full child swarm cannot launch'
README.md:130 states metaswarm uses 'premium child-model overrides by default' — premium default documented
POSITIVE: partial and failed are explicit terminal states in SKILL.md:63,73 — system reports degraded results rather than hiding them
GAP: Neither SKILL.md nor README.md defines behavior when a specific premium model is unavailable at API level (rate limit, quota, outage)
GAP: No explicit banned-model list or validation gate documented in SKILL.md or README.md
GAP: No retry/timeout policy documented for model API failures — unclear if system fails fast or retries with different model
